creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170186
patch

- update to 5.29.3
- remove QtGui and QtNetwork dependencies on ONLYCL-enabled build
- remove QMAKE_PRO and use QMAKE_SOURCE_PATH

News in 5.29.3: http://lalescu.ro/liviu/fet/news.html
